name: Winter Fruit Compote Jam
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Jim Beam or other good bourbon
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the dried apricots and prunes in a saucepan with enough water to cover. Simmer for 5 minutes and let cool in the liquid.
2. Mix the diced apples, pear, plums, and banana.
3. Dice the cooled prunes and apricots, reserving the liquid.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the dates, raisins, nuts with sugar and cinnamon.
5. Stir the mixture into the rest of the fruit.
6. Divide the fruit in half and place each portion in three quart casserole dishes.
7. Dot each dish with 1 tablespoon butter or margarine, sprinkle with lemon zest and 1/2 lime juice.
8. Add the remaining fruit, dotting with the remaining butter or margarine; add the last of the lime juice and lemon zest.
9. Pour over the reserved fruit liquid and 1/4 cup Jim Beam or other bourbon.
10. Bake at 325°F for approximately 1 hour or until the fruit is very soft. Stir once during baking.
11. Serve lukewarm with whipped cream or ice cream if desired. Serves 6.
